description: This online course covers trading fundamentals, including the differences between trading and investing, fundamental and technical analysis, and market psychology.
topic_summary: The session begins with an overview of trading and investing concepts [t=0:40]. It explains trading definitions, strategies, and risk tolerance [t=1:05]. The course also differentiates between trading styles like day trading and swing trading [t=3:07]. Finally, it discusses the analysis frameworks used by investors and traders [t=6:07].
